provider: HKUST 2025/26 BEng in Decision Analytics Major Requirements
note: The official PDF is headed 2026-27 requirements for the 2025-26 intake. This supplement records the 41 unique explicit course codes across Engineering Fundamental Courses, Required Courses and the two bounded Area Elective lists. Students must complete five Area Electives for at least 15 credits, with all five courses taken from either Financial Engineering or Consulting Services; IEDA4510 is listed in both areas and is stored once with both memberships. IEDA3180 remains because the intake-specific PDF explicitly lists it, while noting that it was last offered in 2024-25 and deleted subsequently. IEDA4000 carries an official variable 1-3 credits, so its local credits value is unknown rather than assuming either endpoint. University Common Core requirements are outside this Programme-local supplement, so these rows must not be treated as a graduation-completion decision.
